description: Search, publish, mirror, and manage Facebook Marketplace seller workflows with explicit write checkpoints.

auth_env_var_specs.name: FACEBOOK_MARKET_COOKIES
auth_env_var_specs.description: Browser session cookies captured from Chrome for facebook.com.

novel_features.name: AI listing drafter
novel_features.description: Draft a Marketplace title, description, and price suggestion from photos and notes.

novel_features.name: Buy-side watcher
novel_features.description: Persist a Marketplace search watch with deterministic keyword, price, and distance filters.

novel_features.name: Watch matches
novel_features.description: Show new watch matches after deterministic filtering.

novel_features.name: Stale listing query
novel_features.description: Find local seller listings older than seven days with no engagement.

novel_features.name: Write-gated seller reply
novel_features.description: Prepare and send a seller inbox reply only when `--write` and doctor gating both pass.
